launches.name: Radar
launches.tagline: The missing open-source Kubernetes UI
launches.description: Radar brings your Kubernetes workflows into one fast, open-source UI: real-time topology, resources, events, Helm, GitOps, live traffic flows, security & best-practice checks, image filesystem inspection, and MCP for AI agents. Run it locally as a single binary or self-host it in-cluster with RBAC + OIDC — no account, agents, or cloud required.

launches.name: Huddle01 VMs
launches.tagline: Virtual Machines for Your Agents
launches.description: Huddle01 Cloud allows you to spin up a Virtual Machine (VM) from your favourite AI assistant now! The MCP server lets you control your infrastructure setup on Huddle01 just by chatting. Works with Claude, Cursor, Antigravity, or anywhere you can set up MCPs. Your virtual machines come with Unlimited Ingress, Per-second billing, and Unthrottled NVMe Storage.

launches.name: PandaProbe
launches.tagline: open source agent engineering platform
launches.description: PandaProbe is an open-source agent engineering platform that gives you deep observability into AI agent applications. Use it to trace, evaluate, monitor and debug your AI agents in development and production.

launches.name: Rosentic
launches.tagline: Catch when coding agents break each other before merge
launches.description: Rosentic checks every PR against every other open PR before merge. When coding agents work in parallel, they break each other in ways no single-PR tool catches. Rosentic catches it. Deterministic analysis. Same scan, same result, every time. Most scans come back clean. That means you're clear to merge. Runs on your infrastructure. One YAML file, no signup, 60-second install.

launches.name: Vfoli
launches.tagline: Publish your venture portfolio
launches.description: Paste a link. Get a portfolio. Vfoli's AI builds the entire page around your venture for founders showing what they've built and investors showing what they've backed. Updates, analytics, and discovery built in.

launches.name: Uncluttr - Clean up your tabs
launches.tagline: The tab bar was never meant for 80+ tabs. Let AI organize it
launches.description: You have too many tabs open right now. You know it, your RAM knows it, your fan knows it. Uncluttr replaces the tab bar with a vertical sidebar and uses AI to group your tabs automatically, by project, topic or domain. Inactive tabs get suspended to free memory. Everything persists during crashes and restarts.

launches.name: Iconstack: MCP-Native Icon Search
launches.tagline: Semantic search + MCP + API. 50k icons. Always free.
launches.description: IconStack is the icon library built for how modern developers and designers workflow. 50,000+ icons from 15+ libraries; unified, semantic, and AI-native. → Semantic search: find icons by meaning, not system names → MCP support: your AI agent queries icons directly in-editor → API access: programmatic access for tools and pipelines → Always free. No account. No paywall. Forever. One search. Every library. Built to last.

launches.name: Blurts-Voice to Any Task App
launches.tagline: Speak your chaos. Blurts turns it into tasks.
launches.description: Blurts uses AI to sift through the mess and find the gold. It strips filler words, creates tasks, assigns dates, and syncs everything to your tools automatically. Built by a husband-and-wife team with a baby, full-time jobs, and zero time to write down tasks.

launches.name: PostGun
launches.tagline: Build, remix and post on every social network
launches.description: Creating for every platform means jumping between Canva, a scheduler, y 5 different apps, designing once and reuploading everywhere. PostGun gives you a built-in canvas to build posts, a remix tool to turn viral content into your own, and one-click publishing to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and more, all from a single calendar. Build it once. Remix the rest. Post everywhere.

launches.name: Graphloom
launches.tagline: The home for Etsy sellers - AI images + listings in 60s
launches.description: We built Graphloom for one reason: Etsy sellers deserve professional product photos - not just the ones who can afford a $200 photographer. 🖼️ WHAT IT DOES: Upload your product photo → get studio-quality images + a complete Etsy listing generator in under 60 seconds.

launches.name: bouncy
launches.tagline: Tiny Rust headless browser for scraping.
launches.description: bouncy is a web scraper. Tiny, fast, ships as a single binary — no Node, no Chrome, no Python to install. Point it at a URL and get back the HTML, the visible text, or every link on the page. If the page only renders properly with JavaScript, bouncy will run the JavaScript too. Use it from the command line like curl, or drop it in as a Playwright backend.

launches.name: ChillMac
launches.tagline: Free fan control and system monitor for your Mac
launches.description: ChillMac is a free, open-source macOS menu bar app that puts fan control and live system monitoring one click from your menu bar. See real-time fan RPM, override fan speeds with manual sliders or Low/Medium/High/Max performance modes, and track CPU, memory, battery, disk, and temperature sensors in clean SwiftUI dashboards. Works on Apple Silicon and Intel Macs. Signed, notarized, and MIT licensed — no account, no telemetry, no paywalls.

launches.name: AgentFlow Enterprise
launches.tagline: Sovereign AI Revenue Infrastructure for Enterprises.
launches.description: AgentFlow Enterprise is a sovereign, production-ready AI revenue infrastructure built on Next.js 14 and Supabase. Unlike standard wrappers, it features a zero-trust architecture designed for complex lead qualification and autonomous CRM routing. 🛡️ Built for the EU market (GDPR & EU AI Act aligned). 🚀 Turnkey M&A Asset: Skip 6 months of dev. 💻 Tech: TypeScript, Vercel Edge, RLS Security. 🤝 Available for full acquisition (€15k).

launches.name: AI Leads
launches.tagline: Wake up to 10 warm UK prospects daily — we do the outreach
launches.description: UK B2B outreach done for you — more sales, less work, £10/week. Every business day we write your emails, choose your 1,000 UK contacts, run your campaigns, and deliver your 10 warmest prospects to your inbox by 07:00. No agency fees. No contact lists. No time wasted. Early-bird: £10/week, first 500 customers, locked for life. 7-day free trial.

launches.name: Over/Under Market Intelligence
launches.tagline: AI-leveraged analysis of prediction markets finds the edge
launches.description: O/U is a prediction market analysis tool that finds edge pricing on thousands of Kalshi and Polymarket contracts. Independently calculated probabilities help you identify great buys and avoid bad ones. Go deeper with on-demand analyses that equip you with reasoning, sources, confidence levels, and information about potential price pivots. O/U has a fully graphic interface and is easy to use. Best of all, the core analysis is totally free and updates every two hours.

launches.name: Charmly
launches.tagline: Pro-grade dating profile photos from one selfie
launches.description: Skip the studio. Charmly turns one selfie into pro-grade profile photos for dating apps — in about 60 seconds. Why Charmly • Your real face, hair, and body shape stay intact — only the scene, outfit, and pose change • 50+ presets across Scene, Outfit, Pose, Angle (or write your own) • First photo in ~60s, around $1/photo on bigger packs • No subscription. Failed shots are auto-refunded • 14 languages For anyone who wants better dating photos without a $300+ studio shoot.

launches.name: The Multivac
launches.tagline: Which LLM thinks best? Blind peer-judged leaderboard.
launches.description: Most LLM leaderboards are static, gameable, or judged by a single model. The Multivac runs a 10×10 blind peer matrix: every frontier model answers, then judges every other model's answer without knowing whose it is. What you get is a ranking of reasoning quality, not memorized benchmarks. Features: Ask Multivac (live multi-model answers + share pages), Model Pulse heatmap, head-to-head Compare, full data export, and an open-source evaluation engine (MIT).

launches.name: AI Local Recorder
launches.tagline: 100% Offline AI Voice Recorder
launches.description: AI Local Recorder is a fully offline voice recorder with on-device AI. Record audio, auto-transcribe, and ask questions about what was said — all without uploading a byte to the cloud. Supports multiple languages. Privacy-first, no tracking, no account required.

launches.name: Citedge
launches.tagline: AI recommends your competitors. We fix that.
launches.description: Most B2B brands are invisible in AI search. When buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Claude for recommendations, your competitors show up - you don't. Citedge scans all 4 major AI models with the prompts your buyers actually use. You see exactly who's beating you, on which models, and why. Then our platform generates the fixes: comparison articles, Reddit posts, schema markup, review platform profiles - ready to copy and publish.

launches.name: Framehouse
launches.tagline: Interior Design + DIY Made Ridiculously Easy
launches.description: You have the mood board. You know what beautiful looks like. But the same couch from 2019 is still there: because every time you get close to a decision, something stops you. Design media shows you other people's rooms. DIY content talks down to you. Framehouse lives in that gap: AI design tools paired with real editorial guidance, so you build rooms that feel genuinely yours. Not a render factory. A design confidence platform. iOS, April 7.

launches.name: convention.sh
launches.tagline: Stop AI agents from writing sloppy TypeScript
launches.description: convention.sh is a hosted MCP server with 27 hand-tuned TypeScript conventions. Coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Amp pull conventions just-in-time — so they don't thrash and you don't pay for tokens you don't need. Benchmarked on Claude Opus 4.7 to produce production-ready code 59% faster, 44% cheaper, and with 84% fewer input tokens vs baseline. Free tier available, no credit card required.

launches.name: Image 2
launches.tagline: GPT Image 2
launches.description: Free credits on signup. Image 2 — independent AI image & video platform with perfect text, consistent characters, and cinematic video.

launches.name: ClearChain
launches.tagline: Open-source crypto AML — OFAC screening & SAR drafts in <10s
launches.description: Know in 10 seconds whether a wallet is clean, connected to a mixer, or on a government sanctions list — with the SAR draft written automatically. Free, open source.

launches.name: SnapOG - Easy, SEO Friendly Social Cards
launches.tagline: One meta tag for every page, every site, every idea!
launches.description: SnapOG turns any URL into a clean 1200×630 social card in one HTTP call. Set og:image once and your card ships across Slack, X, LinkedIn, and iMessage. Pages render in a narrow viewport and compose into a poster frame so headlines stay readable. Free SEO/OG audit at snapog.com flags broken cards, missing meta, and bad aspect ratios. MCP tools let agents pull cards and audits straight into their workflow. For founders who want quality social card images without designing them.

launches.name: BeVisible
launches.tagline: Rank on Google & Get mentioned by AI
launches.description: BeVisible helps SaaS companies grow organic traffic on autopilot. It automates SEO content creation, improves visibility in AI search, and tracks how often your brand appears across Google, ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and other answer engines. Build topical authority, find content opportunities, and get discovered wherever your customers search.

launches.name: Zappnod
launches.tagline: Build private AI automations from natural language. ⚡
launches.description: Zappnod is a high-performance engine that turns your English into private Node.js code. Stop paying per-task fees and start owning your business logic. 100% Private. 100% Free. 100% Yours.

launches.name: vibecoding.engineer
launches.tagline: The pixel-art cosmos where vibe-coded projects find the star
launches.description: We built vibecoding.engineer — a living, space-themed directory of projects built with AI pair-programming tools like Cursor, Claude, Lovable, Bolt, and GPT. The vibe coding movement is exploding, but there's no canonical place to discover, showcase, or celebrate what people are building with AI. Portfolios get buried in tweets. Projects disappear into the void.

launches.name: Synthelos
launches.tagline: Synthetic focus groups for $49. Not $5,000
launches.description: Most founders skip market research — it costs $5,000 and takes weeks. So they guess and waste money. Synthelos runs AI market research in under 5 minutes. 8 modules: Focus Groups, Conjoint Analysis, Price Sensitivity, Website Analyzer, Ad Testing, Competitor Analysis, Concept Testing, and Pain Point Discovery. Every module is also available via public REST API. Real answers before you spend real money. $49/month.

launches.name: MockRounds AI
launches.tagline: Practice interviews that actually feel real.
launches.description: Most tools focus on problems (LeetCode) or unstructured peer mocks. Mockrounds focuses on interview performance. It’s a voice-first AI interviewer that listens, asks dynamic follow-ups based on your answers and whiteboard, and pushes you like a real senior engineer. You get FAANG-style evaluation plus a spoken debrief and written report. The goal isn’t practice questions — it’s practicing how you think, communicate, and perform under real interview pressure.

launches.name: Flowwled
launches.tagline: An AI CFO with an opinion. Buy or skip?
launches.description: Flowwled is an AI CFO for solo founders and freelancers. Log any expense and get a Buy / Don't Buy verdict scored against your business goals. Track runway in real-time. Simulate big moves before you make them. Replace spreadsheets and gut-feeling with clarity.

launches.name: Creator Income Copilot
launches.tagline: AI monetization strategist for creators
launches.description: Paste your creator URL. Get an 11-section AI strategy from a virtual Shark Tank advisory board: monetization opportunities ranked by revenue potential, the best first offer to launch with pricing, a LinkedIn growth plan using Know-Like-Trust, 3 content scripts, and a 7-day plan to your first $1,000. Free. No signup. Powered by Groq + LLaMA 3.3 70B.

launches.name: Agentlock
launches.tagline: Your AI agent asks. You decide. From your phone.
launches.description: AgentLock is the security gateway for AI agents. Protect your API keys with a "Request-Approve-Execute" workflow. Agents request actions, you approve via mobile, and our secure runner executes. Never share secrets with agents again.

launches.name: GPTfy
launches.tagline: The Agentforce Alternative, Built 100% Native on Salesforce
launches.description: GPTfy is the Agentforce alternative built 100% native on Salesforce. Deploy agentic AI with your models (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini), fixed per-user pricing, and zero vendor lock-in. Go live in days with 100+ pre-built prompts, automatic email sync, and enterprise security with GDPR & HIPAA compliance.

launches.name: Collecta
launches.tagline: Turn saved content into posts you can actually publish
launches.description: Save posts from all your social apps in one place, then let Collecta turn them into content you can actually publish. Stop hoarding inspiration — start executing it.

launches.name: Mockin 2.0
launches.tagline: Ultimate career toolkit for UX/UI & Product designers
launches.description: We once hit #1 Product of the Day with voice interviews. Now we’re back with a complete UX/UI career toolkit. Upload your CV. Get real feedback. Land your next UX/UI job.

launches.name: Aximote In-Car App
launches.tagline: The fitness tracker for your car
launches.description: Aximote turns your car into a transparent, data-driven system. Our new Android Automotive in-car app gives drivers real-time feedback on trips, efficiency, speed, consistency, energy use, charging, and costs, without OBD hardware. It is like a fitness tracker for your car, built directly into the dashboard.

launches.name: IsraelVC
launches.tagline: The cleanest Israeli VC map ever built
launches.description: IsraelVC is a clean, curated directory of venture capital funds investing in Israeli startups. The goal is simple: make the Israeli venture ecosystem easier to navigate for founders, investors, and anyone tracking the market.

launches.name: TinyLottie
launches.tagline: Smart Lottie optimization for high-performance SaaS.
launches.description: Optimize and compress Lottie (JSON) and dotLottie animations up to 98% instantly. Zero uploads, 100% private in-browser tool for designers and developers.

launches.name: Deskboard
launches.tagline: Turn your PC folders into visual boards
launches.description: Deskboard transforms your folders into personal spaces where your notes live right next to your files. Customise your board with various themes & decorations, custom file icons, animated wallpapers, widgets like Music Player and To-do list, etc. The best part? Everything remains local and synced with your actual files.

launches.name: Tambr
launches.tagline: Turn any story into a multi-voice audiobook
launches.description: Tambr turns any story into a multi-voice audiobook. Paste, upload, or link anything and each character gets their own voice, so dialogue actually sounds real. Perfect for stories, novels, fanfiction, scripts, and more.

launches.name: Posting Machine AI
launches.tagline: Turn your LinkedIn into a sales pipeline for B2B founders
launches.description: Posting Machine helps B2B founders build LinkedIn pipeline without adding hours to their week. Approve a week of posts in 10 minutes, all drafted from real conversations already happening in your Slack. Then see exactly who's engaging and turn that attention into warm conversations — not cold outreach.

launches.name: today, a small planet — earth day
launches.tagline: A 2-minute space for quiet reflection and connection.
launches.description: Tonight is the Flower Moon — May's full moon, named for the blossoms that bloom under its light. I built this small app to mark the day. This is a personal fan tribute, inspired by "Spinning Globe" (地球儀) — a song by Japanese artist Kenshi Yonezu for Studio Ghibli's The Boy and the Heron. It’s a quiet tool designed not to change the world, but to soften the way we meet our own ordinary days. How it works: The app asks one quiet question: "Think of someone." That's all. Thank You.

launches.name: Apollo Deploy
launches.tagline: Ship releases faster. Control risk in real time.
launches.description: AI is shipping code faster than ever. Most teams are still flying blind during rollouts.Apollo Deploy delivers real-time release intelligence. It aggregates live signals from Sentry and your SDK telemetry, detects anomalies as they happen, and provides clear guidance for smarter, safer decisions across Android, iOS, AWS, Vercel, Cloudflare, and beyond. Built to help you ship fast with confidence. Early access opening soon — join the waitlist.

launches.name: Adventure On
launches.tagline: Curate travel videos beautifully & book it easily
launches.description: Skip tab overload just share videos and we take it from there. AO will Instantly map exact locations. Get a personalized itinerary based on your specific travel style. You can organize videos into collections and sub-collections that you find on Instagram or TikTok. Visualize it beautifully in our interactive map & book flights, stays, and activities at one place.

launches.name: GitMission
launches.tagline: Master Git by solving real world problems in real projects
launches.description: Master Git with GitMission's interactive missions. Collaborate with a virtual engineering team, use an in-browser terminal, and learn Git by doing – no boring tutorials!

launches.name: Send Once
launches.tagline: SendOnce — Send it. They see it. It's gone.
launches.description: SendOnce lets you send passwords, credentials, contracts, and sensitive documents through a one-time encrypted link. Locked to the recipient. Opens once. Permanently deleted after.

launches.name: SPADES Music App
launches.tagline: Free offline Windows music player — no internet, no account
launches.description: SPADES Music App is a completely free offline music player for Windows built in Flutter by a 16 year old self taught developer from Melbourne, Australia. Play your local music files without needing Spotify or an internet connection. No ads, no data collection, no account required. Features include folder watching, synced lyrics via LRCLIB, queue management and instant search.

launches.name: Helipod
launches.tagline: Your ultimate co-DevOps. Ship faster, pay as you go.
launches.description: Helipod is your co-DevOps platform to deploy web apps, APIs, and AI workloads in minutes. Enjoy Railway-level DX with auto-builds, 40+ 1-click templates, real-time logs, and a live terminal. No DevOps complexity, no credit card walls. Pay only what you use.

launches.name: CourtSensei
launches.tagline: Basketball coaching hub — plays, film, drills & scout
launches.description: All-in-one tool for basketball coaches: weekly practice plans, drill library, tactics whiteboard, video clips and scouting reports.

launches.name: DBHost
launches.tagline: Postgres without the side project.
launches.description: Managed PostgreSQL for indie hackers, hobby devs, small startups, and devtools builders who keep buying VPS boxes just to run Postgres. Every database ships with PgBouncer pooling, daily backups (30-day retention), a REST API, and a CLI. Provision in 60 seconds. From $0/mo, flat pricing.

launches.name: PomoTodo
launches.tagline: Helping people to turn productivity into fun with perks
launches.description: Discover PomoTodo, the ultimate productivity and time management app designed to help you organize tasks, boost focus, and achieve your goals efficiently with an interesting touch. Try out the best digital tools to enhance your productivity today!

launches.name: Fewer: Live every second
launches.tagline: Stoic focus in your menu bar
launches.description: Fewer is a macOS menu bar app. It shows the seconds you have left, ticking down in the corner of your screen. Computed from birth date, country and sex against actuarial data. A memento mori, not a forecast. Private, birth date never leaves your Mac. Always in sight, never in the way. For founders, stoics, and anyone tired of pretending time is infinite.

launches.name: Suzume Mail for Mac (Prelaunch)
launches.tagline: A calm, fast Mac mail app. A modern homage to Sparrow Mail.
launches.description: Suzume keeps the speed and personality of classic desktop mail while cutting clutter. Text-first reading, quick reply flow, and local-first privacy. Public launch target is June 2026, with an early adopter pre-launch price of $9.99 for the first 100 supporters.

launches.name: Feevio
launches.tagline: 10 essential financial calculators for small business
launches.description: Feevio packs 10 essential financial calculators into one fast, focused iOS app — reverse tax, sales tax, discount, margin vs markup, break-even, marketplace fees, net payout, hourly rate, % change, and tip split. Built for sellers, freelancers, and small business owners. Real-time results, side-by-side comparison mode, fee presets for eBay, Amazon, Etsy, Shopify, Stripe, and PayPal, plus an Apple Watch companion. Free with ads — one-time IAP unlocks premium.

launches.name: Sycee — Your Zodiac Guide
launches.tagline: Your Chinese almanac, personal
launches.description: Sycee reads the day for you the way a Chinese almanac would — your Four Pillars (八字), your Day Master, your luck cycle, today's elemental weather, and the auspicious hours — all in one quiet, beautiful place. Built around your birth chart, Sycee turns ancient BaZi (八字命理) and Tung Shing (通勝) traditions into something you can actually live with day to day. No fortune-cookie vagueness. Just a clear, classical reading rendered in a modern app.

launches.name: AuthorWidget
launches.tagline: Add beautiful author boxes to your website in seconds
launches.description: Create optimized author profiles with schema markup to improve E-E-A-T, build credibility, and help Google trust your content. AuthorWidget helps bloggers, publications, and e-commerce stores create professional author bio boxes that boost E-E-A-T and search rankings. 🔹 One script tag — embed on WordPress, Shopify, Ghost, Webflow, or any HTML site. 🔹 Schema.org JSON-LD — automatic structured data Google can read. 🔹 Embed analytics — track impressions, clicks, and engagement.

launches.name: Smart Cron Generator | Crontab Generator
launches.tagline: Easily create cron jobs for PHP, Node.js, Python, Bash,URLs
launches.description: Free Smart Cron Generator. Easily create crontab jobs for PHP, Node.js, Python, Bash, and URLs.

launches.name: FastVidl
launches.tagline: "FastVidl is a privacy-focused online video downloader insta
launches.description: FastVidl is a free online downloader for Instagram Reels, Stories, Photos, Facebook videos, and Pinterest videos. No watermark, no login, no app. Save public media in HD on mobile and desktop.

launches.name: iTienda
launches.tagline: Free POS App — Run Your Entire Shop From Your Phone
launches.description: iTienda is the free mobile POS app built for Filipino small shops. Manage orders, billing, kitchen display, analytics & digital menu — all from your phone. No hardware needed. Download free on Android.

launches.name: Clientum
launches.tagline: The ERP that centralizes billing, clients & finance for SMBs
launches.description: Clientum is an all-in-one ERP built for freelancers, SMBs and professional firms. It centralizes invoicing, treasury, CRM, HR, inventory and accounting in a single platform — so you stop juggling tools and start running your business with clarity. Built in Spain, designed for the way small businesses actually work. Request a demo and see it live.

launches.name: Tutram — Instagram Shop Builder
launches.tagline: Turn your Instagram into a full online store
launches.description: Tutram helps Instagram sellers turn their profile into a full online shop. Customers can browse products, see prices, and place orders instantly — no more endless DMs. Create your store in minutes and start selling smarter.

launches.name: BukBuk - Alarm App (Morning Routine)
launches.tagline: Wake up with Missions. Set up a Morning Routine
launches.description: Bukbuk helps you build better mornings with mission-based-alarms linked with customizable routines. Set alarms with missions you must complete to dismiss — solve a math problem, scan a QR code, scan a specific object with your camera, or even walk to the bathroom. Link alarms to your morning routine and turn waking up into a daily habit. Stop oversleeping. Start your day with intention.

launches.name: Orbit
launches.tagline: Stop starting courses. Start finishing them with Orbit.
launches.description: Most people don’t struggle to learn — they struggle to stay consistent. Orbit is a habit-based learning platform designed to help people finish what they start. Instead of long, overwhelming courses, Orbit delivers structured, bite-sized learning with clear paths, built-in accountability, and real-life pacing. We’re not building another content platform. We’re building a system for consistency. Stop searching. Start learning.

launches.name: Sonant
launches.tagline: A glass like music controller for your Mac menu bar.
launches.description: Tired of Cmd-Tabbing just to skip a track? Sonant is a native, lightweight macOS menu bar app that gives you total control over Apple Music and Spotify. Built with a glass like aesthetic, it features: Now Playing: Track info, album art, and scrubbing at a glance. Live Visualizer: Real-time 4-band audio visualization. Native & Fast: 3.5MB universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel). Privacy First: No accounts and local processing only. 7-day free trial included!
